title: Created From The Fog
description: Create Mods Combined with From The Fog additions
body:
Created From the Fog is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack that seamlessly integrates the Create mod and From the Fog mod, offering players a unique blend of engineering ingenuity and atmospheric exploration.

Within this modpack, the Create mod serves as the backbone of technological advancement, providing players with a vast array of mechanical components and automation tools. From intricate pulley systems to automated farming solutions, the Create mod empowers players to design and construct complex machinery limited only by their creativity and engineering prowess.

## List of mods included with this modpack:
**Create:**
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: New Age
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Structures

**World Additions:**
- Ambient Sounds
- Better Animations Collection
- Dynamic Trees
- From The Fog
- Sound Physics Remastered

**Misc:**
- Oculus
- Entity Culling
- Ferrite Core
- Modernn Fix
- Memory Leak Fix
- JEI (Just Enough Items)
- Kotlin for Forge
- ServerCore
- Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat
- Vein Mining
- Bad Packets
- Jade
- GeckoLib
- BetterF3
- Botarium
- Cloth Config API
- CraterLib
- CreativeCore
- Range of Shader Packs and Texture Packs
